description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a collared, button-up shirt with vertical stripes and a pair of fitted trousers. Her shoes are simple and flat, suitable for walking in an urban environment. The figure has shoulder-length, wavy hair that frames her face and falls naturally down her back. The clothing and body proportions are realistic, with subtle detailing on the shirt and pants to suggest fabric folds and seams. The overall appearance is that of a casually dressed pedestrian, ready to be placed in a city or neighborhood setting.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a striped shirt and trousers, standing in a T-pose with shoulder-length wavy hair. Realistic proportions and subtle clothing details make her suitable for urban scenes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the striped shirt, facial features, and both arms extended outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the shirt's fit, and the straight posture.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the shirt, trousers, and the full length of the hair.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the body profile, arm extension, and the side of the shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: collared button-up shirt and fitted trousers
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
